title: Is there a board or setting to see "team view" but sorted by projects rather than people?
excerpt:
We utilize the Team View to see resources capacity which is great. Is there a board or a way to populate similar information but rather that group by resource, group by the project?

posts.author: mmulloy (Morgan Mulloy)
posts.cookedHtml:
We utilize the Team View to see resources capacity which is great. Is there a board or a way to populate similar information but rather that group by resource, group by the project?

The overall goal is to have a high-level view of what will be due for each client that week in one place.
